description: Guardrails-style policy cases for respectful and evidence-based follow-up drafts.

cases.draft_message: Hello, our records show invoice INV-CED-1001 has an outstanding balance of USD 1,240.50 due on 2026-06-30. Could you confirm whether payment is scheduled, or let us know if there is any issue we should review?
Pay this invoice today or we will immediately report you and take legal action without further notice.
Your invoice is overdue and you must pay the balance today.
Hello, invoice INV-CED-1002 appears unpaid. Please confirm whether payment is planned.
